title: Gooey Slovakian Chicken Bake
description: A spicy, crispy Slovakian dish featuring chicken stock cube, en-croute, plant-based-friendly. Perfect for a lazy Sunday.
instructions: In a shallow dish, mix together flour, paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper.
Dip each chicken breast in the flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium-high heat. Add the coated chicken breasts and cook until golden brown on both sides, about 5-6 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken breasts to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the shredded mozzarella cheese and chicken broth.
Pour the cheese mixture evenly over the chicken breasts.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve hot.
